briefs.title: BC Horse Racing Regulation Takes Effect April 2026 — New Licensing and Betting Rules
briefs.summary: A new Horse Racing Regulation under BC's Gaming Control Act takes effect April 13, 2026. It sets out definitions and rules for horse racing licences (official permits to operate), betting restrictions for straight bets (picking one winner) and exotic bets (more complex wagers), and clarifies when a licensee is considered to have an interest in a horse — which affects what bets they can place.
briefs.action_required: Review the new Horse Racing Regulation before April 13, 2026 to ensure your licences and betting practices comply.

key_dates.label: BC Horse Racing Regulation under Gaming Control Act takes effect
